contract_summary: This function releases the reference on the memory scratch buffer object (adev->mem_scratch.robj) by calling amdgpu_bo_free_kernel, which decrements the reference count and potentially frees the underlying TTM buffer object. After the call, the pointer is set to NULL, making the function idempotent. The caller must ensure no further access to the buffer occurs after this function returns. This is a put wrapper and is typically invoked during device teardown.
